series_metadata.series_description: Official minutes, meeting tapes, orders and decisions of a state agency, commission, board, or council.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Saved executed (signed) Board minutes are scanned into the OCC''s data system and retained until no longer of administrative value. ; Paper: Paper copy of executed (signed) Board minutes retained for 1 year. Purge will take place at following years end and destroyed. State Archives will review the minutes before disposal., Electronic: Erase ; Paper: Recycle
